name: Entra Risky Users Active Accounts Without Employee Record
description: Detects active Entra Risky Users accounts whose email does not match any employee record.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.user_principal_name AS email FROM entra_risky_users u LEFT JOIN employees e ON LOWER(COALESCE(u.user_principal_name, '')) = LOWER(e.work_email) WHERE 1=1 AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.user_principal_name), '') != '' AND e.work_email IS NULL
remediation: Review unmatched accounts, classify approved non-employee identities, and disable unknown access.
